pr.title: Record: Loqui Auris — 10L + LoRA TTT (mean val_bpb=1.0865, 2 seeds)

output.summary: 10-layer GQA Transformer with Int6 quantization, Muon+EMA training, and per-document LoRA TTT after torch.compile reset to keep adaptation paths active.
output.valOnlyReasoning: LoRA adapters are trained per validation document during test-time training to adapt the base model on the fly.
techniques: Int6 per-row quantization with zstd-22 compression
Muon+AdamW training with EMA 0.997 on a 10-layer GQA stack
Per-document LoRA test-time training on a fresh uncompiled model
